creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
(In reply to Vladislav V. Prodan from comment #3)

(gdb) bt full
#0  strlen (str=0x8047babd3 <Address 0x8047babd3 out of bounds>) at /usr/src/lib/libc/string/strlen.c:101
